meta.name: Grammarly Inline Suggestion Design System
meta.description: Design token and component profile for replicating Grammarly's inline writing suggestion UI. Covers correctness cards, highlight states, typography, iconography, and interaction patterns.
meta.intended_use: Feed into Cursor or any AI coding assistant to replicate Grammarly-style inline suggestion components with design accuracy.

brand.description: Grammarly's signature green. Used for primary CTAs, active states, and brand accents.

correctness.usage: Underline highlight, category icon fill, strikethrough text color

font_family.description: System UI stack; Grammarly uses native system fonts for seamless editor integration.

shadows.description: Card shadow is soft and layered — not harsh. Suggests floating UI element over editor canvas.

inline_highlight.description: Text inside the editor that has an error or suggestion flagged.

states.default: Subtle red tint background + wavy underline
states.active_card_open: Maintained highlight while card is visible

suggestion_card.description: Floating card that appears below/near the highlighted word. Contains category label, preview of correction, and action buttons.
suggestion_card.layout: Vertical flex column, fixed width, floating above content layer

children: div.grm-card__header  → category icon + category name + info icon
div.grm-card__preview → correction preview text with strikethrough/replacement

card_header.description: Top row of the suggestion card. Shows category icon, category name, and an info (ⓘ) icon.
card_header.layout: Horizontal flex row, align-items center, space between icon+label group and info icon

category_icon.shape: Shield with a checkmark or category-specific icon
category_icon.style: Duotone / half-filled shield icon. Left half filled with category color, right half outline.
category_icon.container: No background container — icon floats inline

card_header.separator: · (middle dot character) between category type and label text

card_preview.description: Shows the before/after text inline. Strikethrough = original error, bold colored = suggestion.
card_preview.layout: Inline text paragraph with mixed spans

context_text.style: Normal weight, muted — surrounding context words shown in grey to frame the correction

card_actions.description: Bottom row of the card. Primary CTA on left, ghost dismiss on right.
card_actions.layout: Horizontal flex row, align-items center, gap 12px

dismiss_button.label: Dismiss
dismiss_button.style: Ghost/text button — no background, no border

interaction_patterns.trigger: User clicks or hovers on an inline highlight
interaction_patterns.card_position: Below the highlighted word, aligned to its left edge. Falls back to above if near viewport bottom.
interaction_patterns.dismiss_behavior: Click Dismiss or click outside card closes it without making changes
interaction_patterns.accept_behavior: Replaces highlighted text with suggestion, removes highlight, closes card

design_principles.non_intrusive: The UI never covers the user's content aggressively. Cards are compact, shadows are soft.
design_principles.color_as_signal: Red = error/correctness. Color is semantic, not decorative.
design_principles.clear_hierarchy: Category label → Preview → Action. Each layer has distinct visual weight.
design_principles.inline_context: Corrections are shown in-place with surrounding context, not in a sidebar.
design_principles.minimal_chrome: No headers, no logos inside the card. Pure utility UI.
design_principles.accessible_contrast: Accept button uses deep blue (#3B5BDB) on white for strong contrast ratio.

html_structure_reference.comment: Minimal DOM structure to replicate the component
